boundary.meaning: This is the full A_985 lift of the Drinfeld/Grothendieck center, including full centrality and the irreducible character table over the verifier field.
boundary.not_claimed: No modular S or T matrix is claimed here; a twist/ribbon operator is not present in the certified input data.

verified_claims: The 39 Drinfeld half-braiding idempotents multiply as pairwise orthogonal idempotents inside the full A_985 multiplication tensor.
Their sum is the full A_985 unit, not merely the 297-dimensional closed-loop unit.
Each of the 39 idempotents is central against every one of the 985 relation-basis elements; the check covers 37,838,775 scalar coefficient equalities.
The regular traces are perfect squares and recover the full Wedderburn block-size multiset of A_985.
The irreducible character table over F_1000003 has been computed for all 39 sectors on all 985 relation-basis elements.
The character table passes the unit-character, regular-character reconstruction, and primitive-central-idempotent diagonal tests.
The same sectors decompose the 2576-point dodecad permutation module with integral multiplicities.
The q42 and q12 public diagonal shadows have ranks 12 and 6 respectively.
